---
title: "Jesus' End-Time Timeline - What Sign Will Signal the End of the World"
date: 2017-10-24
description: "Jesus' Response to the Disciples' 3rd Question - What Will Signal the End of the World?"  
categories: [End-Times Timeline, End of the World, Jesus' Return, Matthew 24, Signs]
---

## What Is Jesus' End-Time Timeline

This is part 1 of Jesus' End-Time Timeline series as documented in Matthew 24. This article covers Jesus' response to the disciples' third question in Matthew 24:3 - **"What Sign Will Signal The End Of The World?"**

At the end of part 3 of this series, is a pdf of my side-by-side comparison of Jesus' End-Time Timeline as recorded in Matthew 24, Mark 13, and Luke 21.  If you would like the actual spreadsheet, send me an [e-mail](mailto:admin@benotdeceived.org).  Let me know if you need it in .xlsx or .ods format.

NOTE - **I am intentionally keeping my comments, opinions, interpretations, etc., to a bare minimum.  The whole point is to determine what the Word of God actually says, not what I, or anyone else, think it says.**

## What Exactly Does Jesus Say

### Discussion Prompted By Disciples

> Mat 24:1 NLT - As Jesus was leaving the Temple grounds, his disciples pointed out to him the various Temple buildings.
> 
> Mat 24:2 NLT - But he responded, "Do you see all these buildings? I tell you the truth, they will be completely demolished. Not one stone will be left on top of another!"

### The Disciples' Three Questions

- [When Will All This Happen - Part 3](http://benotdeceived.org/jesus-end-time-timeline-part-3/)
- [What Sign Will Signal Your Return - Part 2](http://benotdeceived.org/jesus-end-time-timeline-part-2/)
- [What Sign Will Signal The End of the World - Part 1](http://benotdeceived.org/jesus-end-time-timeline-part-1/)

NOTE - Jesus answers these questions in the reverse order they are listed in Matthew 24:3.

> Mat 24:3 NLT - Later, Jesus sat on the Mount of Olives. His disciples came to him privately and said, "**Tell us, when will all this happen?** **What sign will signal your return and the end of the world?"**

### What Sign Will Signal The End Of The World?

- False Christs
- Many Deceived
- Wars And Threats of Wars

#### The End Is Not Yet

> Mat 24:4 NLT - Jesus told them, "Don't let anyone mislead you,
> 
> Mat 24:5 NLT - for many will come in my name, claiming, 'I am the Messiah.' They will deceive many.
> 
> Mat 24:6 NLT - And you will hear of wars and threats of wars, but don't panic. Yes, these things must take place, **but the end won't follow immediately.**

#### The Beginning of Birth Pains

- War - Nation vs Nation; Kingdom vs Kingdom
- Global Famines
- Global Earthquakes

> Mat 24:7 NLT - Nation will go to war against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be famines and earthquakes in many parts of the world.
> 
> Mat 24:8 NLT - But **all this is only the first of the birth pains, with more to come**.

Luke 21:11 adds ...

- Global Plagues
- Terrifying Things
- Great Miraculous Signs From Heaven

> Luk 21:11 NLT - There will be great earthquakes, and there will be famines and plagues in many lands, and there will be terrifying things and great miraculous signs from heaven.

#### The More To Come

- Arrest, Persecution, Killing of Christian Martyrs
- Global Hatred for Christians
- Global Turning Away From God
- Rampant Betrayal and Hatred
- False Prophets
- Many Deceived
- Global Rampant Sin
- Love Of Many Grows Cold
- Gospel Preached To The Whole World

> Mat 24:9 NLT - "**Then** you will be arrested, persecuted, and killed. You will be hated all over the world because you are my followers.
> 
> Mat 24:10 NLT - And many will turn away from me and betray and hate each other.
> 
> Mat 24:11 NLT - And many false prophets will appear and will deceive many people.
> 
> Mat 24:12 NLT - Sin will be rampant everywhere, and the love of many will grow cold.
> 
> Mat 24:13 NLT - But the one who endures to the end will be saved.
> 
> Mat 24:14 NLT - And the Good News about the Kingdom will be preached throughout the whole world, so that all nations will hear it; and **then the end will come**.

Luke 21:12-19 expands on these signs.

- A Time Of Great Persecution
- Dragged Into Synagogues \[Courts\] And Prisons
- Stand Trial Before Kings and Governors
- Divine Wisdom Granted
- Family And Friends Will Betray
- Martyrdom
- Worldwide Hatred Of Christians

> Luk 21:12 NLT - "But **before all this occurs**, there will be a time of great persecution. You will be dragged into synagogues and prisons, and you will stand trial before kings and governors because you are my followers**.**
> 
> Luk 21:13 NLT - But this will be your opportunity to tell them about me.
> 
> Luk 21:14 NLT - So don't worry in advance about how to answer the charges against you,
> 
> Luk 21:15 NLT - for I will give you the right words and such wisdom that none of your opponents will be able to reply or refute you!
> 
> Luk 21:16 NLT - Even those closest to you--your parents, brothers, relatives, and friends--will betray you. They will even kill some of you.
> 
> Luk 21:17 NLT - And everyone will hate you because you are my followers.
> 
> Luk 21:18 NLT - But not a hair of your head will perish!
> 
> Luk 21:19 NLT - By standing firm, you will win your souls.

[Part 2 - Jesus' End-Time Timeline - "What Sign Will Signal Your Return?"](http://benotdeceived.org/jesus-end-time-timeline-part-2/)

[Part 3 - Jesus' End-Time Timeline - "When Will All This Happen?"](http://benotdeceived.org/jesus-end-time-timeline-part-3/)
